title: STOP Using Claude Code Without This Fable 5 Agentic OS
summary: Video tutorial on setting up Fable 5 Agentic OS to enhance Claude Code efficiency. Covers architecture, memory, observability, and skill customization for building autonomous AI agent systems.
writeup: Chase AI walks through building an agentic operating system on top of Claude Code, covering the architecture, memory management, observability, and skill customization that the setup involves. The tutorial uses an implementation called JARVIS as a worked example and lays out a three-step setup process. The focus is on the structural pieces that turn Claude Code into a persistent, observable agent environment rather than a single-prompt tool.
